'''Spor crawlers''' were small eight-centimeter-long poisonous insects native to the planet [[Nar Bo Sholla]]. 

==Biology and appearance==
Spor crawlers were small insects that had a double-pronged stinger on the end of the tail. They produced a powerful poison that was extremely painful to the victim. The poison could be treated by a standard [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]] but the survivor remained in pain for several days.
They reproduced by laying small, black eggs in the dead bodies of their prey. They had a life span that averaged three years in the wild, and reached up to ten years in captivity. They had large, multifaceted eyes that gave the creature a wide field of vision and eight legs for locomotion. Unlike many insects, spor crawlers did not have a hardened carapace and could easily be crushed.<ref name="CG" />

==Behavior==
The creatures liked to hide in small places or under soil and lived in hives of up to fifty individuals.<ref name="CG" />

==History==
The poison they generated in their double-pronged spiked tail made them widely sought by [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] and collectors of exotic creatures. This led them to being banned in many systems. If not banned, owners were required to de-venom the creatures.<ref name="CG" />
